name: Chicken'n Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Uncooked regular long grain rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat chicken with flour.
2. Heat oil in Dutch oven until hot.
3. Cook chicken in oil over medium heat 15 to 20 minutes or until brown on all sides; drain.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F.
5. Mix tomatoes, water, rice, onion, garlic, oregano, paprika, salt and pepper in ungreased 2-quart casserole.
6. Arrange chicken in casserole.
7. Cover; bake for 30 minutes.
8. Stir in peas, bell pepper and olives. Cover; bake for 30 to 40 minutes or until chicken is done.
9. Serve with cheese.
10. Makes 4 servings.
